description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a small notch at the top, likely housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The back is finished in a glossy, light-colored material and displays a prominent Apple logo in the center, with a triple-lens camera module located in the top left corner. The sides are metallic, giving the device a premium look and feel, and the overall build appears slim and compact. No physical buttons are visible on the front or sides in these views, suggesting a minimalist design. The screen displays a colorful, abstract wallpaper with gradients of blue, purple, and black.
description: A slim, modern smartphone with a large display, glossy light-colored back, and a triple-lens camera module. The device features a metallic frame and a prominent Apple logo.
description_view_0: The front view shows the large, edge-to-edge display with a notch at the top and a vibrant abstract wallpaper.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the slim metallic edge and the thin profile of the device.
description_view_2: The back view reveals a glossy light finish, a centered Apple logo, and a triple-lens camera module in the top left corner.
description_view_3: The right side view again emphasizes the thinness and metallic edge, with a partial view of the camera bump.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, clearly visible against the light-colored surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful, abstract wallpaper with gradients of blue, purple, and black. No icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: A triple camera array is located in the top left corner on the back, arranged in a square module with an LED flash.
